titleStmt.title: SII 39.254: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 254. (A.R. No. 254 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME GŌPURA; LEFT SIDE. VĪRAPRATĀPA DĒVARĀYA MAHĀRĀYA MALLIKĀRJUNARĀYAR-ŚAKA 1383 (1460-61 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the construction of the Mahāmaṇḍapa in the temple of Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiya nāyaṉār, probably by the chief Ekā[m]baranāda Kachchiyarāyaṉ of Viḻandai, who had several birudas like Rāhuttaṇavālaṉ, Arasamārtāṇḍaṉ, Vayira Vīragaṇḍan, Arasanārāyanaṉ, etc.,

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariyarāya vibhāṭa
n bhāṣaikkut tappum Irāyar kaṇṭaṉ muva
ṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrva
tekṣiṇa paccima Uttara catucamuttirātipati śrī virappiṟatāpa
tevarāya mahārāyar mallikāṟcuṉarāyar piṟutuvirācciya
m paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 3 100 8 10 3l mel cellā
niṉṟa vikkiṟama saṅvatsarattu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣa
ttu Ekāteciyum comavāramum peṟṟamirapati nāḷ cuṅkam tavi
tta coḻanallūrāṉa tirumuṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya nā
yaṉār koyil Iṣavatevar maṇṭammāṉa mahāmaṇṭapa
mum nittamaṇṭapamāṉa Eṟaketucaka maṇṭapamummāka
terppukuvittu paṇṇuvitta Irākutta
ṇavāḷan caṅkirāmtiraṉ cavarimuttāṉa vāḷaracar maṇavāḷa
ṉ vayiravarkaṇṭaṉ Aracamāttāṇṭaṉ Aracanārāyaṇaṉ
kaṅkai viṭaṅkap perumāḷ cipatta pattaṉ viḷaṉtai Ēkāmpara
nāta kaccirāyaṉ § śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 39.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
